summary: Completed testing of SoulNutri new features (Iteration 4): Notification System, Admin Settings/Premium/API-Usage/Processing-Metrics endpoints, Safe Nutrition Update pipeline, and Moderation Queue verification. Backend: 16/16 tests passed. Frontend: Admin panel verified with Moderação tab, filter dropdown, and all tabs visible.

minor.issue: Returns error when nutrition_3sources module not available - expected behavior for external dependency

critical_code_review_comments: Notification system correctly implements max 1 notification/day per user
All notifications include references with valid URLs (WHO, Harvard, Mayo Clinic, etc.)
Admin endpoints (settings, premium/users, api-usage, processing-metrics) all return 200
Safe nutrition update pipeline has preview/dry-run, audit log, and rollback functionality
NotificationPanel component has proper data-testid attributes for testing
Notification bell only visible for premium users (correct behavior)
Admin Moderação tab has filter dropdown with all options: Pendentes, Aprovados, Rejeitados, Corrigidos, Todos
seed_data_creation: Test notifications created during pytest execution with unique user_pin per test
context_for_next_testing_agent: New features tested: 1) Notification System - POST /api/notifications/generate (max 1/day), GET /api/notifications/{user_pin}, POST /api/notifications/{user_pin}/read. All notifications include references with URLs. 2) Admin endpoints - GET /api/admin/settings, GET /api/admin/premium/users, GET /api/admin/api-usage, GET /api/admin/processing-metrics all return 200. 3) Safe Nutrition Update - POST /api/admin/nutrition/preview (requires nutrition_3sources module), POST /api/admin/nutrition/update-single, POST /api/admin/nutrition/rollback, GET /api/admin/nutrition/audit-log. 4) Frontend - NotificationPanel has data-testid='notification-panel', notification bell has data-testid='notification-bell' (only for premium users), Admin Moderação tab has filter with all options.

passed_tests: test_generate_notification - POST /api/notifications/generate creates notification with references
test_max_one_notification_per_day - Second notification same day correctly rejected
test_get_user_notifications - GET /api/notifications/{user_pin} returns list with unread count
test_notification_has_references - Notifications include references with valid URLs

frontend_verification.admin_moderation_tab: Visible with badge showing pending count
frontend_verification.moderation_filter: Dropdown with options: Pendentes, Aprovados, Rejeitados, Corrigidos, Todos
frontend_verification.notification_bell: Only visible for premium users (correct behavior)

notification_system.references: All notifications include references with valid URLs
